title: verbena junciformis
intro: Verbena junciformis, also known as the river verbena or slender verbena, is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family that is native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Verbena junciformis include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. In herbal preparations, Verbena junciformis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in topical applications such as creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
